## [00:00 - 03:00]

Hi, this is Don Crowther with a video about using benefits and second level benefits in your cells during your webinar. So we have just finished giving the product and mission statements. a course, it would be it's five modules that teaches you x it gives you tools and gives you videos and recordings and coaching calls and course portal and, and all kinds of stuff. Benefits are the emotional feelings. It's what motivates them to actually buy. In fact, the benefits are what actually makes the sale. ## [09:09 - 11:18]

going to love me as a result, that's where the real selling happened. So here's what you get, the benefits, benefit one, benefit two, benefit three. Here's what that means to you. Now you show them the second level benefit, one, two, three. So whenever you show benefits, always spend some time and show them the second level benefit. So your email gets delivered. So you make more money. Your mind is clear and peaceful. So you live longer, enjoy better relationships, get more done, whatever that is, these second level benefits. As I said, these oftentimes are different transformational level in people's lives. But it's what people really want. That's why they buy your product is to get to the second level benefits. And if we don't specifically talk about those second level benefits, we lose them. Now we don't spend a lot of time trying to describe them because they already know what they are. They already know what they feel like and what they look like. But don't leave yourself unoptimized by not telling them that they will get the second level benefits from this product. I'll give you a bonus tip. Always show the benefits before you describe the features. Why? Because the benefits will get them emotionally sold, then you sell them on the features which gives them the justification to be able to buy the thing they just emotionally decided to buy. And bonus tip number two, save a few benefits for your clothes. Because when it comes time to close, we're going to re-show them this list.
